title: Medieval Craft (Historical Guns)
description: This mod adds guns from history
body:
![m](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/791405e26bd64abf610022ff524d3f71a0ff102c.png)


This mod adds historical firearms like handgonnes, arquebus, flintlocks, rifles etc in to minecraft, in a way that fits better in minecraft than mods that adds modern firearms in to minecraft.

(I have only implemented the first 3 yet, more will come)

This mod is a "spinoff" of my main mod medieval craft



Handgonne
![h](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f41a0099ff98b2d9f83f03531c452b3d73e38252_0.webp)
Very powerful but has a very slow rate of fire, and is very inaccurate, this was one of the first guns invented, popular in the 15th century.





Matchlock
![m](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6cb1c7d379bf8518e6e8c7751858275b2c3806c_0.webp)
Uses a trigger for the match instead loading it manually so that it allows the user to aim with both hands, popular in the late 15th and 16th century.





Musket Model 1777
![f](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4acf24e7eefdf7b53cc1ae84af7bc2775916e9c_0.webp)
Uses flintlock tecknolgy, shoots faster than matchlocks, used in the napoleonic war by the french forces, and many others in the 19th century.
